summary: Highly regarded recording despite thin sound quality
review: The reviewer considers this the best Dead recording they've encountered, though they note the audio sounds "pretty thin." No details about the performance itself are given, so the assessment focuses on the recording's perceived superiority tempered by a lack of fullness.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; reviewer praises it as the best they've found but mentions thin sound, leading to a moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "pretty thin"—lacking depth and fullness—but still regarded by reviewer as the best they have heard.
